title: Unciferia bifalcis

taxonomy: Unciferia bifalcis is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It is native to Madagascar. The classification of Unciferia bifalcis includes its kingdom as Plantae, phylum as Magnoliophyta, and class as Magnoliopsida. Further classification places it in the order Gentianales, family Rubiaceae, and genus Unciferia. The specific epithet 'bifalcis' is derived from Latin, referring to the plant's bifurcated leaves.
